title: Training proposal needs review: timeout_adjustment

payload.title: Increase timeout budget for long-running tasks

proposed_action: Review proposal proposal-timeout-adjustment in .agents/telemetry/optimization_proposals.jsonl, then run: scripts/ai/aq-approve <alert-id>
resolved_by: human: Hardware-bound. _LOCAL_MAX_TOKENS_HARD_CEILING=180 already in place. 31 timeouts are expected P95 behavior on Renoir APU at ~1.35 tok/s. Increasing timeout budget does not resolve hardware-bound generation latency.
